intro: Calocephalus aervoides, also known as the 'Silver Bush' or 'Silver Oat', is a shrubby perennial plant native to Western Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in wound healing, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Calocephalus aervoides include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
